title: Orshefskyd
compiled_truth: Orshefskyd is an external contact at [Gtlaw](companies/gtlaw). Over the corpus period (2001-05-29 to 2001-11-27), Orshefskyd sent 5 and received 25 emails, totalling 30 interactions.
